forces.name: Nigeria Police Force — Akwa Ibom State Control Room
forces.notes: Permanently assigned office lines — do not change with officer postings. General state command

forces.name: Nigeria Police Force — Akwa Ibom State PRO
forces.source: police.gov.ng official NPF directory + NPF PRO contact list 2025

forces.name: 82nd Division Nigerian Army — Enugu
forces.notes: 82 Division covers the South-East. HQ Enugu. No public phone — contact via @HQNigerianArmy.

forces.name: 6th Amphibious Division Nigerian Army — Port Harcourt
forces.notes: 6 Division covers the South-South/Niger Delta. HQ Port Harcourt. No public phone — contact via @HQNigerianArmy.

forces.name: NSCDC — National (works in Akwa Ibom)
forces.source: nscdc.gov.ng official website — 09029164164 is the published report line
forces.notes: NSCDC direct report line. 199 short code exists but may not connect reliably — use this 11-digit number instead
